description: Execute triage scenario for malformed ABC handling in runtime_core.

invocation.summary: Analyze the impact area for stricter malformed ABC input validation in runtime_core.
invocation.issueBody: Ground the triage report in verifier, assembler, and related docs or tests. No code changes are allowed.
extraInstructions: Use at least one `delegate` call with `agent_type` set to `explore` to inspect either verifier or assembler before writing the report.
Do not do all repository exploration yourself; this scenario explicitly requires delegated exploration.
Call out verifier and assembler responsibilities explicitly.
Mention the next concrete follow-up area for implementation.
